# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: AI-assisted login and new authentication flow
- Summary: Showcase the new Google authentication integration and AI-assisted onboarding flow, focusing on secure sign-in, profile sync, and a smoother first-run experience.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assisted-login-ux
- Content kind: text
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: text-only
- Asset label: none
- Asset URL: none
- Asset MIME: unknown
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now offers a streamlined authentication experience with Google sign-in, OAuth 2.0 security, and an AI-assisted onboarding flow to help new users get productive faster without friction.
- CTA: Try the new Google sign-in today and complete your profile in under a minute.
- Visual brief: Short 20–40 second explainer video showing the sign-in flow: user clicks 'Sign in with Google', OAuth prompts, profile setup screen with stats, and a welcome dashboard. Include UI hints: OAuth 2.0 badge, secure icons, and a cyberpunk-themed onboarding screen re: CodeGrind features.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
